stimulus: In her short fiction, Argentine writer Samanta Schweblin frequently draws on the gothic tradition of nineteenth-century Latin American storytellers. Her 2014 novella Fever Dream, for example, is a tense reworking of the rural ghost story, while her 2018 collection ______blank Mouthful of Birds revisits the bestiary motif favored by writers such as Silvina Ocampo.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is the best answer. The title Mouthful of Birds is a restrictive identifier of "her 2018 collection" (no commas), parallel in structure to "Her 2014 novella Fever Dream" earlier in the sentence. No punctuation is needed between the descriptor and the title.

Choice B is incorrect because a dash would wrongly set off the title as a parenthetical insertion, breaking the parallel with the earlier restrictive title. Choices C and D are incorrect because a comma or colon would also wrongly imply that the title is nonrestrictive supplementary material.
